name: Adanto Vanguard
oracle_text:
As long as this creature is attacking, it gets +2/+0.
Pay 4 life: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)

name: Admiral Beckett Brass
oracle_text:
Other Pirates you control get +1/+1.
At the beginning of your end step, gain control of target nonland permanent controlled by a player who was dealt combat damage by three or more Pirates this turn.
flavor_text: "You and your ship will make a fine addition to my fleet."

name: Air Elemental
oracle_text: Flying
flavor_text: As the ship approached, the jade totem rose high overhead. Power rippled. Eyes of stone glowed and crackled. Out hissed a breath of the world, and a windstorm came alive.

name: Ancient Brontodon
flavor_text: It is taller than all but the tallest trees, and older than all but the oldest.

name: Angrath's Marauders
oracle_text: If a source you control would deal damage to a permanent or player, it deals double that damage to that permanent or player instead.
flavor_text: Captain Angrath cares less about treasure than mayhem. If he can't leave Ixalan, he'll burn the plane down.

name: Anointed Deacon
oracle_text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may have target Vampire get +2/+0 until end of turn.
flavor_text: Inspiration is red as rubies, flowing like honeyed wine.

name: Arcane Adaptation
oracle_text:
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Creatures you control are the chosen type in addition to their other types. The same is true for creature spells you control and creature cards you own that aren't on the battlefield.

name: Arguel's Blood Fast // Temple of Aclazotz

card_faces.name: Arguel's Blood Fast
card_faces.oracle_text:
{1}{B}, Pay 2 life: Draw a card.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have 5 or less life, you may transform Arguel's Blood Fast.
card_faces.flavor_text: Arguel's vision led him into the jungles of Ixalan . . .

card_faces.name: Temple of Aclazotz
card_faces.oracle_text:
(Transforms from Arguel's Blood Fast.)
{T}: Add {B}.
{T}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain life equal to the sacrificed creature's toughness.
card_faces.flavor_text: . . . to the lost temple of a bat-god of night, eternal enemy to the Threefold Sun.

all_parts.name: Arguel's Blood Fast // Temple of Aclazotz

name: Ashes of the Abhorrent
oracle_text:
Players can't cast spells from graveyards or activate abilities of cards in graveyards.
Whenever a creature dies, you gain 1 life.
flavor_text: "Let no trace of the vampires' foulness remain."

name: Atzocan Archer
oracle_text:
Reach
When this creature enters, you may have it fight another target creature. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)
flavor_text: His arrows are fletched with feathers from the greatest of the winged dinosaurs.

name: Axis of Mortality
oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may have two target players exchange life totals.
flavor_text: The Church of Dusk teaches there is no gain without loss, no triumph without sacrifice, no drink of exquisite crimson without a dying gasp.

name: Belligerent Brontodon
oracle_text: Each creature you control assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.
flavor_text: Predators try to separate the young, old, or injured from the rest of the herd. The alternative is crushing defeat.

name: Bellowing Aegisaur
oracle_text: Enrage — Whenever this creature is dealt damage, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control.
flavor_text: Its roaring challenge is punctuated by the slam of its tail on the earth, rousing the herds of the plains.

name: Bishop of Rebirth
oracle_text:
Vigilance
Whenever this creature attacks, you may return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
flavor_text: "In the death of the foe lies the resurrection of the faithful."

name: Bishop of the Bloodstained
oracle_text: When this creature enters, target opponent loses 1 life for each Vampire you control.
flavor_text: "They shall give us all they have as penance for their resistance. Their ships. Their goods. Their rebellious blood."

name: Bishop's Soldier
oracle_text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
flavor_text: Vampires, the noble class of old Torrezon, are guided by their dual loyalties to church and crown.

name: Blight Keeper
oracle_text:
Flying
{7}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Target opponent loses 4 life and you gain 4 life.
flavor_text: It withers fruit and flesh alike.

name: Blinding Fog
oracle_text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to creatures this turn. Creatures you control gain hexproof until end of turn. (They can't be the targets of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
flavor_text: "I see you, shiny soldiers, but you won't see me."

name: Bloodcrazed Paladin
oracle_text:
Flash
This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature that died this turn.
flavor_text: When a paladin undertaking the Blood Fast finally gives in to hunger, the violence is sudden, explosive, and complete.

name: Blossom Dryad
oracle_text: {T}: Untap target land.
flavor_text: The only force on Ixalan not interested in finding the golden city is Ixalan itself.

name: Bonded Horncrest
oracle_text: This creature can't attack or block alone.
flavor_text:
"You don't tame a horncrest. You convince it that it's easier to destroy something else."
—Amautl, knight of Atzocan

name: Boneyard Parley
oracle_text: Exile up to five target creature cards from graveyards. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put all cards from the pile of your choice onto the battlefield under your control and the rest into their owners' graveyards.

name: Brazen Buccaneers
oracle_text:
Haste
When this creature enters, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

name: Bright Reprisal
oracle_text:
Destroy target attacking creature.
Draw a card.
flavor_text: Vampires know blood and the systems that carry it. And they know exactly where to strike to set it free.

name: Burning Sun's Avatar
oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to target opponent or planeswalker and 3 damage to up to one target creature.
flavor_text:
"Tilonalli's searing rays carry the spark of life's eventual destruction as all light fades."
—Chitlati, Lightning Rider

name: Call to the Feast
oracle_text: Create three 1/1 white Vampire creature tokens with lifelink.
flavor_text: By the law of church and crown, vampires feed only on the blood of the guilty—those declared heretics, rebels, or enemies of war.

name: Cancel
oracle_text: Counter target spell.
flavor_text:
"Hold your fire, obviously."
—Captain Brandis Thorn

name: Captain Lannery Storm
oracle_text:
Haste
Whenever Captain Lannery Storm attacks, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
Whenever you sacrifice a Treasure, Captain Lannery Storm gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

name: Captivating Crew
oracle_text: {3}{R}: Gain control of target creature an opponent controls until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: "We sail. We plunder. Then we dance."

name: Carnage Tyrant
oracle_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Trample, hexproof
flavor_text: Sun Empire commanders are well versed in advanced martial strategy. Still, the correct maneuver is usually to deploy the giant, implacable death lizard.

name: Castaway's Despair
oracle_text:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

name: Charging Monstrosaur
oracle_text: Trample, haste
flavor_text: "I knew I should have stayed with the boat. Always stay with the boat!"

name: Chart a Course
oracle_text: Draw two cards. Then discard a card unless you attacked this turn.
flavor_text: While other pirates prowl for treasure, Captain Parrish plunders secrets.

name: Cobbled Wings
oracle_text:
Equipped creature has flying.
Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
flavor_text: Flotsam held together by optimism.

name: Colossal Dreadmaw
oracle_text: Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)
flavor_text: If you feel the ground quake, run. If you hear its bellow, flee. If you see its teeth, it's too late.

name: Commune with Dinosaurs
oracle_text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a Dinosaur or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card_faces.name: Conqueror's Galleon
card_faces.oracle_text:
When this Vehicle attacks, exile it at end of combat, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control.
Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card_faces.name: Conqueror's Foothold
card_faces.oracle_text:
(Transforms from Conqueror's Galleon.)
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.
{4}, {T}: Draw a card.
{6}, {T}: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

name: Contract Killing
oracle_text: Destroy target creature. Create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
flavor_text: For a price, the floating city of High and Dry offers all the amenities a pirate could want: rest, recreation, and revenge.

name: Costly Plunder
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature.
Draw two cards.
flavor_text: No lock of iron is a match for Vraska's will of stone.

name: Crash the Ramparts
oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.
flavor_text: The Legion's conquistadors could endure Ixalan's sun. Their forts could withstand a charging ceratops. But nothing can stop a ceratops strengthened by the sun.

name: Crushing Canopy
oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature with flying.
• Destroy target enchantment.
flavor_text:
"Do not mistake your lofty vantage point for safety."
—Shaper Tuvasa

name: Daring Saboteur
oracle_text:
{2}{U}: This creature can't be blocked this turn.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
flavor_text: "They'll never see me coming."

name: Dark Nourishment
oracle_text: Dark Nourishment deals 3 damage to any target. You gain 3 life.
flavor_text: Demons lurk in the shadows of ancient ruins, spreading plague and corruption across the land.

name: Deadeye Plunderers
oracle_text:
This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.
{2}{U}{B}: Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
flavor_text: "Keep your friends close and your enemies within range."

name: Deadeye Quartermaster
oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for an Equipment or Vehicle card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
flavor_text: "Welcome aboard, mate! You're going to need this."

name: Deadeye Tormentor
oracle_text: Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, target opponent discards a card.
flavor_text: Despite their noble heritage, the pirates of the Deadeye Fleet are known for underhanded tactics and despicable trickery.

name: Deadeye Tracker
oracle_text: {1}{B}, {T}: Exile two target cards from an opponent's graveyard. This creature explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

name: Deathgorge Scavenger
oracle_text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may exile target card from a graveyard. If a creature card is exiled this way, you gain 2 life. If a noncreature card is exiled this way, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

name: Deathless Ancient
oracle_text:
Flying
Tap three untapped Vampires you control: Return this card from your graveyard to your hand.
flavor_text: "Ancient one, we have reached the promised shore. The Immortal Sun is near. Drink and awake."

name: Deeproot Champion
oracle_text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
flavor_text: "No good will come from what you seek. Turn back now or suffer an ignoble death far from your home."

name: Deeproot Warrior
oracle_text: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavor_text:
"We breathe from our soul and bones to give strength to the jungle. The jungle breathes from its roots and rivers to give strength to us."
—Shaper Falani

name: Deeproot Waters
oracle_text: Whenever you cast a Merfolk spell, create a 1/1 blue Merfolk creature token with hexproof. (A creature with hexproof can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
flavor_text: A visit to the Deeproot Tree and its ancient spring replenishes a merfolk's connection to nature.

name: Demolish
oracle_text: Destroy target artifact or land.
flavor_text: What took months for human hands to carve took just seconds for the dinosaur's tail to ruin.

name: Demystify
oracle_text: Destroy target enchantment.
flavor_text: "The River Heralds carve spells into jade, hoping to steer us from our course. But what right do they have to keep us from that which once was ours?"

name: Depths of Desire
oracle_text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
flavor_text: Pockets full of gold, lungs full of brine.

name: Desperate Castaways
oracle_text: This creature can't attack unless you control an artifact.
flavor_text: A pirate crew without a ship is a crew that will do anything to get one.

name: Dinosaur Stampede
oracle_text: Attacking creatures get +2/+0 until end of turn. Dinosaurs you control gain trample until end of turn.
flavor_text: If you're in the way of a ceratops charge and you're made of mere flesh and bone, then you're not really in the way.

name: Dire Fleet Captain
oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each other attacking Pirate.
flavor_text: Orcs are happiest under captains who steer toward battle. Orcs of the Dire Fleet are downright jovial.

name: Dire Fleet Hoarder
oracle_text: When this creature dies, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
flavor_text: Among the pirates of the Brazen Coalition, the only thing more dangerous than failure is success.

name: Dire Fleet Interloper
oracle_text:
Menace
When this creature enters, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

name: Dire Fleet Ravager
oracle_text:
Menace, deathtouch
When this creature enters, each player loses a third of their life, rounded up.
flavor_text: His fists fume with the decay of death, each strike a plague on the hearts of his enemies.

name: Dive Down
oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +0/+3 and gains hexproof until end of turn. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
flavor_text: "Seeing the river is not the same as seeing the fish."

card_faces.name: Dowsing Dagger
card_faces.oracle_text:
When this Equipment enters, target opponent creates two 0/2 green Plant creature tokens with defender.
Equipped creature gets +2/+1.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, you may transform this Equipment.
Equip {2}

card_faces.name: Lost Vale
card_faces.oracle_text:
(Transforms from Dowsing Dagger.)
{T}: Add three mana of any one color.
card_faces.flavor_text: The pirates had ventured into the interior for treasure. They found something far greater.

name: Dragonskull Summit
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Swamp or a Mountain.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
flavor_text: When the Planeswalker Angrath called dinosaurs "dragons," the name stuck in certain pirate circles.

name: Dreamcaller Siren
oracle_text:
Flash
Flying
This creature can block only creatures with flying.
When this creature enters, if you control another Pirate, tap up to two target nonland permanents.

name: Drover of the Mighty
oracle_text:
This creature gets +2/+2 as long as you control a Dinosaur.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
flavor_text: "I do not lead. They do not follow. We walk together."

name: Drowned Catacomb
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control an Island or a Swamp.
{T}: Add {U} or {B}.
flavor_text: None can tell how many vessels are tangled up on the sea floor—or how much treasure remains unclaimed.

name: Dual Shot
oracle_text: Dual Shot deals 1 damage to each of up to two target creatures.
flavor_text: "Through me the rage of Tilonalli burns twice as bright."

name: Duress
oracle_text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card.
flavor_text: Solitude and starvation are brutal punishments, but even worse is all that time to think.

name: Duskborne Skymarcher
oracle_text:
Flying
{W}, {T}: Target attacking Vampire gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavor_text: "The hour of Dusk is come."

name: Dusk Legion Dreadnought
oracle_text:
Vigilance
Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)
flavor_text: It loomed up over the horizon, silent and dark as a grave.

oracle_text:
This artifact doesn't untap during your untap step.
{4}, {T}: This artifact deals 2 damage to any target.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may discard a card. If you do, untap this artifact.

name: Emergent Growth
oracle_text: Target creature gets +5/+5 until end of turn and must be blocked this turn if able.
flavor_text: "By accepting my smallness I am vast."

name: Emissary of Sunrise
oracle_text:
First strike
When this creature enters, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

name: Emperor's Vanguard
oracle_text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

name: Encampment Keeper
oracle_text:
First strike
{7}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn.
flavor_text: Paladins of the Sanctum Seeker order are an adventurous lot, venturing into the wilds with monstrous mastiffs at their side.

name: Entrancing Melody
oracle_text: Gain control of target creature with mana value X.
flavor_text: The stronger the will, the more bewitching the song.

name: Fathom Fleet Captain
oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever this creature attacks, if you control another nontoken Pirate, you may pay {2}. If you do, create a 2/2 black Pirate creature token with menace.
flavor_text: "Join me, and take the world for yourself!"

name: Fathom Fleet Cutthroat
oracle_text: When this creature enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls that was dealt damage this turn.
flavor_text: "It was a bad evening for you, mate. Now it's chow time for the sharks."

name: Fathom Fleet Firebrand
oracle_text: {1}{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
flavor_text: As she charges into battle, her arcane tattoos stir and crawl like fiery serpents.

name: Favorable Winds
oracle_text: Creatures you control with flying get +1/+1.
flavor_text:
"Like ribbons of wind and wisdom the coatls fly, twisting mystery into truth, shaping the clouds to suit their inscrutable will."
—Huatli

name: Fell Flagship
oracle_text:
Pirates you control get +1/+0.
Whenever this Vehicle deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card.
Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

name: Field of Ruin
oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target nonbasic land an opponent controls. Each player searches their library for a basic land card, puts it onto the battlefield, then shuffles.

name: Fiery Cannonade
oracle_text: Fiery Cannonade deals 2 damage to each non-Pirate creature.
flavor_text: Wary of the ferocious dinosaurs, the Legion of Dusk built up the walls of their fort—just in time for the pirates to burn them down.

name: Firecannon Blast
oracle_text:
Firecannon Blast deals 3 damage to target creature.
Raid — Firecannon Blast deals 6 damage instead if you attacked this turn.
flavor_text: Goblins' fearlessness and diminutive size make them the perfect cannoneers.

name: Fire Shrine Keeper
oracle_text:
Menace
{7}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals 3 damage to each of up to two target creatures.
flavor_text: Though grimed with the dust of centuries, the ancient shrine was not unguarded.

name: Fleet Swallower
oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, target player mills half their library, rounded up.
flavor_text: "Captain, I think that island is following us."

name: Frenzied Raptor
flavor_text: Sun Empire warriors are taught to emulate the fearless raptors that fling themselves against towers of horn and muscle a hundred times their size.

name: Gilded Sentinel
flavor_text: The River Heralds fight to keep all others from reaching the golden city. The city has its own defenses.

name: Gishath, Sun's Avatar
oracle_text:
Vigilance, trample, haste
Whenever Gishath deals combat damage to a player, reveal that many cards from the top of your library. Put any number of Dinosaur creature cards from among them onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

name: Glacial Fortress
oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains or an Island.
{T}: Add {W} or {U}.
flavor_text: Ships blown north in their voyage across the Stormwreck Sea become trapped in the unmelting ice.

name: Glorifier of Dusk
oracle_text:
Pay 2 life: This creature gains flying until end of turn.
Pay 2 life: This creature gains vigilance until end of turn.
flavor_text: "The blood of the enemy is a sacrament. The strength it gives is proof that our cause is just."

name: Goring Ceratops
oracle_text:
Double strike
Whenever this creature attacks, other creatures you control gain double strike until end of turn.
flavor_text:
"Follow her footsteps and she will show you the way."
—Itzama the Crested

name: Grasping Current
oracle_text:
Return up to two target creatures to their owner's hand.
Search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Jace, Ingenious Mind-Mage, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle.

name: Grazing Whiptail
oracle_text: Reach
flavor_text: Often found browsing on the upper canopies of Ixalan's jungles, whiptails are known to absently bat away anything foolish enough to interrupt their meal.

name: Grim Captain's Call
oracle_text: Return a Pirate card from your graveyard to your hand, then do the same for Vampire, Dinosaur, and Merfolk.
flavor_text: When the battle is over, the bitterest foes at last find common ground.

name: Growing Rites of Itlimoc // Itlimoc, Cradle of the Sun

card_faces.name: Growing Rites of Itlimoc
card_faces.oracle_text:
When Growing Rites of Itlimoc enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card_faces.name: Itlimoc, Cradle of the Sun
card_faces.oracle_text:
(Transforms from Growing Rites of Itlimoc.)
{T}: Add {G}.

card_faces.flavor_text: Before the Sun Empire was born, humans and merfolk joined their magic to invoke a blessing of fertility on the land.

all_parts.name: Growing Rites of Itlimoc // Itlimoc, Cradle of the Sun

name: Headstrong Brute
oracle_text:
This creature can't block.
This creature has menace as long as you control another Pirate.
flavor_text:
"Watch your backs, keep your blades at hand, and let the orc go first!"
—Captain Brandis Thorn

name: Headwater Sentries
flavor_text: "The elders say that if the intruders discovered the secret of the golden city, it would mean an end to our people."

name: Heartless Pillage
oracle_text:
Target opponent discards two cards.
Raid — If you attacked this turn, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

name: Herald of Secret Streams
oracle_text: Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them can't be blocked.
flavor_text: "You might as well try to stop the waterfall."

name: Hierophant's Chalice
oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {C}.
flavor_text: In the Rite of Redemption, nobles take the same vows as Elenda, the first vampire, and make the same eternal sacrifice.

name: Hijack
oracle_text: Gain control of target artifact or creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.
flavor_text: Trapped on Ixalan, the Planeswalker Angrath is the only minotaur sailing the seas. No matter how many ships he captures, he cannot break free.

name: Hostage Taker
oracle_text: When this creature enters, exile another target creature or artifact until this creature leaves the battlefield. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast that spell.

name: Huatli, Dinosaur Knight
oracle_text:
+2: Put two +1/+1 counters on up to one target Dinosaur you control.

name: Huatli's Snubhorn
oracle_text: Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
flavor_text: Don't make the mistake of thinking blunt horns can't kill.

name: Huatli's Spurring
oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If you control a Huatli planeswalker, that creature gets +4/+0 until end of turn instead.
flavor_text: "Run like the wind, fierce one. The hunt has begun."

name: Huatli, Warrior Poet
oracle_text:
+2: You gain life equal to the greatest power among creatures you control.

name: Imperial Aerosaur
oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, another target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn.
flavor_text: Its assistance is unnervingly similar to its hunting technique.

name: Imperial Lancer
oracle_text: This creature has double strike as long as you control a Dinosaur.
flavor_text: "Together my mount and I are stronger than either of us apart."

name: Inspiring Cleric
oracle_text: When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.
flavor_text: "The Immortal Sun will bring us true eternal life to replace the everlasting shadow of undeath."

name: Ixalan's Binding
oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.
Your opponents can't cast spells with the same name as the exiled card.
flavor_text: Jace awoke to the certainty that he was lost.

name: Ixalli's Diviner
oracle_text: When this creature enters, it explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)
